revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
    |id            = R with Wikidata item
    |name          = From a cross-project redirect
    |from          = a title linked to an item on Wikidata
    |info          = The Wikidata item linked to this page is {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}|<!--wikidata is linked, no issue-->|{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked! Either link a Wikidata item or remove this template.}}<includeonly>[[Category:Unlinked Wikidata redirects]]</includeonly>}}}}
** Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|hard redirect]]s – for soft redirects use {{tl|Soft redirect with Wikidata item}}.
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
    |id            = R with Wikidata item
    |name          = From a cross-project redirect
    |from          = a title linked to an item on Wikidata
    |info          = The Wikidata item linked to this page is {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}|<!--wikidata is linked, no issue-->|{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked! Either link a Wikidata item or remove this template.}}<includeonly>[[Category:Unlinked Wikidata redirects]]</includeonly>}}}}
** Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|hard redirect]]s – for soft redirects use {{tl|Soft redirect with Wikidata item}}.
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
    |id            = R with Wikidata item
    |name          = From a cross-project redirect
    |from          = a title linked to an item on Wikidata
    |info          = The Wikidata item linked to this page is {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}|<!--wikidata is linked, no issue-->|{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked! Either link a Wikidata item or remove this template.}}<includeonly>[[Category:Unlinked Wikidata redirects]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
</includeonly>}}}}
** Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|hard redirect]]s – for soft redirects use {{tl|Soft redirect with Wikidata item}}.
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
    |id            = R with Wikidata item
    |name          = From a cross-project redirect
    |from          = a title linked to an item on Wikidata
    |info          = The Wikidata item linked to this page is {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}|<!--wikidata is linked, no issue-->|{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked! [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
</includeonly>}}}}
** Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|hard redirect]]s – for soft redirects use {{tl|Soft redirect with Wikidata item}}.
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

</noinclude>{{Redirect template
    |id            = R with Wikidata item

[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
</includeonly>}}}}
** Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|hard redirect]]s – for soft redirects use {{tl|Soft redirect with Wikidata item}}.
}}<noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id = R with Wikidata item |name = From a cross-project redirect |from = a title linked to an item on Wikidata |info = The Wikidata item linked to this page is {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}|<!--wikidata is linked, no issue-->|{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked! Either link a Wikidata item or remove this template.}}<includeonly>[[Category:Unlinked Wikidata redirects]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] </includeonly>}}}} ** Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|hard redirect]]s – for soft redirects use {{tl|Soft redirect with Wikidata item}}. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id = R with Wikidata item |name = From a cross-project redirect |from = a title linked to an item on Wikidata |info = The Wikidata item linked to this page is {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}|<!--wikidata is linked, no issue-->|{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked! Either link a Wikidata item or remove this template.}}<includeonly>[[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>}}}} ** Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|hard redirect]]s – for soft redirects use {{tl|Soft redirect with Wikidata item}}. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Unlinked Wikidata redirects]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id = R with Wikidata item |name = From a cross-project redirect |from = a title linked to an item on Wikidata |info = The Wikidata item linked to this page is {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}||{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked!
